content: A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocols can be redesigned to leverage the emergent curiosity dynamics of 2024 SOTA active learning agent memory systems, creating a collective episodic memory network where agents spontaneously explore uncharted task domains for each other rather than only completing explicitly assigned requests. This creates a decentralized curiosity-driven discovery pipeline that outperforms single-agent curious reinforcement learning by distributing novelty-seeking across heterogeneous agent memory stores.
